name: Chart / Infographic Section
notes: Light Blue #E6F0F9 panel, uniform 12px rounded corners (not accent shape), Brand Blue rounded header bar. ALL CAPS headline Nunito Sans Bold+ with thin Gold rule beneath. Brand Blue + Sky Blue dominant; Sunshine/Gold reserved for key-figure emphasis; gray for placebo. Rounded bar tops. Stat callout large/bold hero % with lighter supporting copy.
